technology.title: First Windows PC powered by Nvidia chips to debut next week, Axios reports - Reuters
technology.summary: First Windows PC powered by Nvidia chips to debut next week, Axios reports Reuters

briefing.news_focus: First Windows PC powered by Nvidia chips to debut next week, Axios reports Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據Reuters報導，首款搭載Nvidia晶片的Windows電腦將於下週正式推出。這一創新標誌著Nvidia在個人電腦市場的進一步擴張，可能會改變市場競爭格局。
briefing.background: Nvidia作為全球領先的圖形處理單元（GPU）製造商，近年來在人工智慧和高效能計算領域取得顯著進展。隨著AI技術的迅速發展，對於高效能計算的需求日益增加，這使得Nvidia的產品受到廣泛關注。Windows作為主流操作系統，其與Nvidia的合作可能會吸引更多開發者和消費者，進一步推動相關技術的應用與普及。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia推出首款Windows電腦的決策可能會引發市場的多方反應。首先，這將加強Nvidia在個人電腦市場的地位，可能會對競爭對手如AMD和Intel造成壓力。其次，消費者對於搭載Nvidia晶片的電腦的期待也可能促進銷售，尤其是在遊戲和專業應用領域。此外，這一產品的推出也可能吸引開發者針對Nvidia平台進行軟體優化，進一步提升使用者體驗。雖然目前沒有其他報導提供補充細節，但市場普遍對於Nvidia的前景持樂觀態度，預期將引發一波新的技術創新。

technology.title: For SpaceX, global dominance may not be written in the stars
technology.summary: The excitement around SpaceX, fuelled by the targeted US$1.8 trillion valuation for its initial public offering and its promising Starship rocket development, has revived a familiar claim: that SpaceX is on course to dominate the space market. Commercially, that view is understandable. SpaceX conducts more space launches than anyone and at very competitive costs, its Starlink satellite internet company provides strong in-house demand, and it has a scale advantage unmatched by any other private...

briefing.news_focus: The excitement around SpaceX, fuelled by the targeted US$1.8 trillion valuation for its initial public offering and its promising Starship rocket development, has revived a familiar claim: that SpaceX is on course to dominate the space market. Commercially, that view is understandable. SpaceX conducts more space launches than anyone and at very competitive costs, its Starlink satellite internet company provides strong in-house demand, and it has a scale advantage unmatched by any other private...
briefing.news_focus_zh: SpaceX的首次公開募股（IPO）估值達到1.8兆美元，並且其Starship火箭的開發進展引發了對該公司在太空市場主導地位的期待。SpaceX目前進行的太空發射數量超過任何其他公司，且成本極具競爭力，其Starlink衛星網路業務也為其提供了穩定的內部需求，顯示出其在私營太空產業中的規模優勢。
briefing.background: SpaceX成立於2002年，致力於降低太空旅行成本並促進人類探索太空的可能性。隨著商業太空市場的興起，SpaceX在發射服務、衛星通信和載人航天等領域迅速擴展。其Starship火箭的開發被視為實現火星殖民的關鍵，而Starlink則是其商業模式的重要組成部分，提供全球高速互聯網服務。這些因素使得SpaceX在全球太空市場中獲得了重要的競爭優勢。
briefing.analysis: 儘管SpaceX在太空市場的表現令人矚目，但其全球主導地位並非板上釘釘。市場上仍有其他競爭者，如藍色起源和維珍銀河等，這些公司也在積極開發新技術和服務，可能會對SpaceX的市場份額構成挑戰。此外，SpaceX的高估值和未來的商業模式仍需面對市場波動和政策風險。各方對SpaceX未來的看法存在分歧，有些分析師認為其技術優勢將持續，而另一些則對其長期盈利能力表示懷疑。隨著太空產業的競爭加劇，SpaceX的發展路徑將受到密切關注。

technology.title: Firms spent heavily on AI. Now rising costs are outpacing its value
technology.summary: AI is getting expensive – and companies are starting to rethink their embrace of the disruptive technology. Playing by a well-worn Silicon Valley playbook, artificial intelligence companies charged rock-bottom prices to hook customers after ChatGPT burst onto the scene. Kevin Simback of start-up incubator Delphi Labs calls it the era of “subsidised intelligence” – meaning investors were basically footing the bill so companies could offer AI on the cheap. “But the tides are beginning to turn,”...

briefing.news_focus: AI is getting expensive – and companies are starting to rethink their embrace of the disruptive technology. Playing by a well-worn Silicon Valley playbook, artificial intelligence companies charged rock-bottom prices to hook customers after ChatGPT burst onto the scene. Kevin Simback of start-up incubator Delphi Labs calls it the era of “subsidised intelligence” – meaning investors were basically footing the bill so companies could offer AI on the cheap. “But the tides are beginning to turn,”...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著人工智慧（AI）技術的普及，企業在AI上的支出逐漸增加，但這些成本的上升速度已超過其帶來的價值。許多公司最初以低價吸引客戶，這一策略被稱為「補貼智慧」，即投資者為企業提供資金以降低價格。然而，隨著市場環境的變化，企業開始重新思考對這項顛覆性技術的投入。
briefing.background: 自從ChatGPT的推出以來，AI技術迅速進入商業應用，許多企業紛紛投入資金以開發和整合AI解決方案。這一過程中，許多AI公司採取了低價策略，以吸引客戶和擴大市場份額。這種策略在短期內獲得了成功，但隨著運營成本的上升，企業開始面臨盈利壓力，導致對AI技術的投資回報率出現疑慮。投資者的支持雖然在初期推動了市場的繁榮，但當成本上升時，這種模式的可持續性受到挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 隨著AI技術的成本上升，企業面臨著重新評估其投資策略的壓力。這一變化可能導致市場上出現更多的競爭與整合，部分企業可能會選擇退出市場或縮減規模，從而影響整體行業的發展。此外，投資者對於AI公司的期望也可能會改變，要求更高的回報和可持續的商業模式。這一趨勢可能會促使企業在AI技術的應用上更加謹慎，並尋求更具成本效益的解決方案。整體而言，這一動態可能會改變AI市場的競爭格局，並影響未來的技術創新。

politics.title: US castigates Europe over defence spend as NATO reassures Asia - Reuters
politics.summary: US castigates Europe over defence spend as NATO reassures Asia Reuters

briefing.news_focus: US castigates Europe over defence spend as NATO reassures Asia Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國對歐洲在國防支出上的不足表示強烈不滿，並批評其未能達到北約的預期標準。與此同時，北約則向亞洲國家表達了保證，強調其在該地區的安全承諾。
briefing.background: 隨著全球安全形勢的變化，特別是俄烏衝突的影響，北約成員國的防務支出問題日益受到關注。美國長期以來一直呼籲歐洲盟友增加國防預算，以應對潛在威脅，並確保集體安全。根據北約的指導方針，成員國應將國防支出提高至GDP的2%。然而，許多歐洲國家仍未達到這一標準，這引發了美國的強烈反應。
briefing.analysis: 美國對歐洲國防支出的批評反映了其對北約集體防衛的重視，並希望促使歐洲盟友加大投入以增強防務能力。這一立場可能會引發歐洲國家的反彈，特別是在一些國家已經面臨內部財政壓力的情況下。另一方面，北約向亞洲國家發出的安全保證，顯示出其在全球範圍內的戰略擴展，意在加強與亞太地區的合作，應對中國的影響力擴張。各方在防務支出和安全合作上的立場差異，可能會影響未來的外交關係和軍事合作。

politics.title: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
politics.summary: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

briefing.news_focus: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 哥倫比亞於近日舉行總統選舉，這場選舉可能會重新定義該國與美國的關係。現任左派總統古斯塔沃·佩特羅與美國總統唐納德·特朗普之間的公開對立，為此次選舉增添了緊張氣氛。
briefing.background: 哥倫比亞的政治環境長期受到武裝衝突的影響，尤其是與革命武裝力量（FARC）及其他武裝團體的衝突。此次選舉的主要競爭在於左派與右派之間的對抗，候選人提出了不同的政策來應對這一持續數十年的衝突。隨著政治暴力的回潮，選民面臨著艱難的選擇，這也反映出社會對於安全與和平的迫切需求。
briefing.analysis: 此次選舉的結果將對哥倫比亞的內政及其與美國的外交關係產生深遠影響。左派候選人佩特羅的政策可能會導致與美國的關係緊張，特別是在毒品政策及人權問題上。相對而言，右派候選人則可能會尋求加強與美國的合作，特別是在安全與經濟領域。參考報導中提到的政治暴力回潮，可能會影響選民的投票意向，進一步複雜化選舉結果的預測。各方對於如何解決武裝衝突的看法存在顯著差異，這將是未來政策制定的重要考量。

supporting_titles: Colombia prepares to go to polls in election shadowed by resurgence of political violence
supporting_summaries: Sunday’s presidential vote is contest between left and right – and between contradictory proposals for dealing with the decades-long armed conflict Mateo Pérez Rueda was one internship away from completing a degree in political science. The 24-year-old also worked as a bicycle delivery rider and sold fruit salads and juice to finance his passion: the Colombian independent digital magazine El Confidente . On 4 May he travelled to Briceño, in the western province of Antioquia, to report on the long-running conflict between the army, paramilitaries and dissidents of the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (Farc). Continue reading...

politics.title: Israel troops capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon push against Hezbollah - Reuters
politics.summary: Israel troops capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon push against Hezbollah Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Israel troops capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon push against Hezbollah Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列軍隊在對真主黨的攻擊中，成功佔領位於黎巴嫩南部的博福特城堡。這一行動標誌著以色列在過去26年來對黎巴嫩的最深度進攻，並伴隨著激烈的戰鬥和空襲，特別是在附近村莊的衝突中。
briefing.background: 博福特城堡的佔領發生在以色列與真主黨之間的緊張局勢升級之際。以色列國防部長以色列·卡茲（Israel Katz）稱此次佔領為重要的戰術勝利，顯示出以色列在該地區的軍事策略轉變。這一事件發生在以色列對黎巴嫩的軍事行動加劇的背景下，該地區的安全局勢持續惡化，並引發了國際社會的關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次以色列軍隊佔領博福特城堡的行動，顯示出以色列對真主黨的強硬立場，並可能導致黎巴嫩境內的進一步軍事行動。根據參考報導，這次行動伴隨著激烈的戰鬥和空襲，顯示出以色列在該地區的軍事壓力加大。以色列國防部長的評價強調了這一行動的戰略意義，可能會激化真主黨的反應，進一步加劇地區緊張局勢。不同報導中，The Hindu International強調了這是以色列在26年來最深的進攻，而Al Jazeera則著重於以色列的驅逐命令，顯示出人道主義危機的潛在風險。

supporting_titles: Israeli Army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
Israel issues more displacement orders in Lebanon, seizes strategic castle
supporting_summaries: The capture of Beaufort Castle near the city of Nabatiyeh came after days of intense fighting and airstrikes in nearby villages, where Israeli troops fought Hezbollah members in the rugged area
Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz describes the capture of Beaufort Castle as a significant tactical victory.

economy.title: Inflation won Trump the presidency, but could cost him the midterms
economy.summary: Trump’s pursuit of policies that drive up prices, including tariffs and war, might be punished in November’s elections For such an uncannily successful politician, Donald Trump exhibits a perplexing political myopia. His most recent own-goal was endorsing Ken Paxton, a state attorney general, against four-term senator John Cornyn in the Republican primary for Senate in Texas. Trump’s endorsement helped push the ethically compromised Maga firebrand over the top, to run against popular Democrat James Talarico in November, complicating the Republicans’ chances to keep the seat. But what truly screams “I want us to lose the midterms” is what Trump is doing about inflation, which is becoming his most vulnerable issue. According to a New York Times/Siena poll of registered voters earlier in May, Trump’s approval on handling the cost of living is underwater by 42 percentage points, poorer than his rating on handling the economy (minus 31 points) and the unpopular war in Iran (minus 34 points). Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Trump’s pursuit of policies that drive up prices, including tariffs and war, might be punished in November’s elections For such an uncannily successful politician, Donald Trump exhibits a perplexing political myopia. His most recent own-goal was endorsing Ken Paxton, a state attorney general, against four-term senator John Cornyn in the Republican primary for Senate in Texas. Trump’s endorsement helped push the ethically compromised Maga firebrand over the top, to run against popular Democrat James Talarico in November, complicating the Republicans’ chances to keep the seat. But what truly screams “I want us to lose the midterms” is what Trump is doing about inflation, which is becoming his most vulnerable issue. According to a New York Times/Siena poll of registered voters earlier in May, Trump’s approval on handling the cost of living is underwater by 42 percentage points, poorer than his rating on handling the economy (minus 31 points) and the unpopular war in Iran (minus 34 points). Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 唐納德·特朗普在追求推高物價的政策，包括關稅和戰爭，可能會在即將到來的中期選舉中受到懲罰。根據最新的民調，選民對特朗普在生活成本問題上的處理評價低落，顯示出他在這一議題上的脆弱性。此外，特朗普對德克薩斯州共和黨初選的支持也引發爭議，可能影響共和黨在該州的選舉前景。
briefing.background: 特朗普在任內推行的多項政策，包括對外貿易的關稅措施，已經對美國的物價造成影響。隨著全球能源價格的上漲，生活成本持續上升，這使得選民對特朗普的經濟管理能力產生質疑。根據《紐約時報》的民調，特朗普在處理生活成本方面的支持率大幅下滑，顯示出選民對其政策的不滿。這一情況可能在即將到來的中期選舉中對共和黨造成不利影響。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的政策導致的通貨膨脹問題，可能會成為他在中期選舉中的致命傷。根據參考報導，全球能源價格的上漲可能進一步加劇生活成本的壓力，這對特朗普的選情無疑是雪上加霜。特朗普在德克薩斯州的初選支持行為也引發了內部爭議，可能削弱共和黨在該州的競爭力。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞強調了特朗普在處理通脹問題上的失誤，而參考報導則關注全球能源價格對經濟的潛在影響，顯示出特朗普面臨的多重挑戰。

supporting_titles: How high could global inflation go?
supporting_summaries: With luck, the Iran war won’t cause a recession. But the surge in energy prices will push up the cost of living

economy.title: AI firm MiniMax prepares for mainland China listing after shares surge in Hong Kong
economy.summary: MiniMax Group, the Chinese artificial intelligence model company, has officially kicked off plans to sell shares in mainland China. This offers onshore investors access to AI players beyond chipmakers and completes a dual-listing status in addition to Hong Kong. The Shanghai-headquartered company signed an agreement with Citic Securities on Friday, hiring the brokerage to help prepare for a sale of yuan-denominated shares. While other details on the listing are scant, it is widely expected that...

briefing.news_focus: MiniMax Group, the Chinese artificial intelligence model company, has officially kicked off plans to sell shares in mainland China. This offers onshore investors access to AI players beyond chipmakers and completes a dual-listing status in addition to Hong Kong. The Shanghai-headquartered company signed an agreement with Citic Securities on Friday, hiring the brokerage to help prepare for a sale of yuan-denominated shares. While other details on the listing are scant, it is widely expected that...
briefing.news_focus_zh: MiniMax Group，這家中國人工智慧模型公司，已正式啟動在中國內地上市的計劃，這將使內地投資者能夠投資於除了芯片製造商以外的AI企業。該公司與中信證券簽署了協議，聘請該券商協助準備發行以人民幣計價的股票。此次上市計劃將使MiniMax在香港的雙重上市地位得以完成。
briefing.background: 中國的人工智慧產業正迅速發展，吸引了大量投資者的關注。隨著政府對科技創新的支持，許多AI公司正在尋求擴展其資本市場的機會。MiniMax的上市計劃不僅能夠為其提供更多資金，還能提升其在市場中的知名度與競爭力。這一動作也反映出中國內地對於高科技企業的投資熱情，尤其是在AI領域，這與國際市場對於中國科技公司的興趣相呼應。
briefing.analysis: MiniMax的上市計劃顯示出中國內地市場對於AI企業的開放程度正在提高，這對於尋求進一步增長的科技公司來說是一個利好消息。根據參考報導，儘管未提供具體細節，但市場普遍預期MiniMax的上市將吸引大量資金流入，進一步促進其業務擴展。不同於其他報導強調的製造業成功，MiniMax的案例突顯了科技創新在中國經濟中的重要性。各方利益相關者，包括投資者、政府及科技企業，將密切關注這一上市進程，因為它可能會影響整個AI產業的資金流向及發展趨勢。

supporting_titles: Beyblade mania spins nostalgia in Hong Kong
supporting_summaries: Does the country’s manufacturing success leave space for anyone else?

economy.title: Spain’s property market sees boost as Hongkongers, others, depart the UK and Canada
economy.summary: Hong Kong families in the United Kingdom and Canada are facing deep uncertainty due to shifting immigration policies and the rising cost of living, and some are looking for alternative destinations to settle. Property agents said Spain’s Non-Lucrative Visa (NLV), designed for retirees and anyone who can support themselves without employment, had become one of their top choices. The NLV provides a pathway for citizens outside the European Union and the European Economic Area who have enough...

briefing.news_focus: Hong Kong families in the United Kingdom and Canada are facing deep uncertainty due to shifting immigration policies and the rising cost of living, and some are looking for alternative destinations to settle. Property agents said Spain’s Non-Lucrative Visa (NLV), designed for retirees and anyone who can support themselves without employment, had become one of their top choices. The NLV provides a pathway for citizens outside the European Union and the European Economic Area who have enough...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 由於英國和加拿大的移民政策變化及生活成本上升，許多香港家庭面臨不確定性，開始尋找新的定居地。西班牙的非營利簽證（NLV）成為他們的熱門選擇，該簽證適合退休人士及能自給自足的人士，為非歐盟及歐洲經濟區的國籍提供了入境途徑。
briefing.background: 近年來，英國和加拿大的移民政策經歷了顯著變化，這使得香港家庭在這些國家的生活變得越來越困難。特別是英國，隨著生活成本的上升，許多香港人感到無法承擔日常開支。西班牙的非營利簽證（NLV）則提供了一個相對容易的移民選擇，吸引了希望在歐洲定居的香港家庭。該簽證不要求持有人在西班牙工作，這對於希望保持經濟獨立的移民來說，無疑是一大優勢。
briefing.analysis: 香港家庭的移民潮對西班牙的房地產市場產生了正面影響，因為這些家庭尋求在生活成本較低的國家安家。根據主新聞，西班牙的非營利簽證吸引了大量尋求穩定生活的移民，這可能會推高當地的房地產需求。另一方面，參考報導提到的香港和新加坡在金融行業面臨的AI影響，顯示出這些地區的工作市場正在經歷變化，可能進一步促使專業人士尋求海外機會。雖然參考報導未直接涉及西班牙的情況，但它反映了香港人對於未來職業安全的擔憂，這可能會加速他們的移民決策。
